title: 3D glass pane
description: This pack basically makes the glass plane in the java edition to look like bedrock edition glass pane including in the inventory and the hotbar.
body:
This pack basically makes the glass plane in the java edition to look like bedrock edition glass pane including in the inventory and the hotbar.

Also fixs a bug which makes the light gray glass pane invisible in the inventory and hotbar.

![3D glass pane in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f9684f608762de70053dd816bbb3a6323f5efc0.png)

supports 1.19 - 1.21.1

If any questions or report a bug or have anything to suggest feel free to [Join my discord server](https://discord.gg/qRm6FKvJxr)!
